title: Zeta: When the Dead Awaken
overview: Deon, a high school delinquent and his mother, Isma suffering from early stage of Alzheimers, are trapped inside their apartment during a sudden mysterious outbreak. Deon bumps into Reza, who was on his way to his brother’s apartment, Reyhan. Meanwhile, Deon’s father, Dr. Ross joins the special force to get the serum for the outbreak.
